name: SPX CORP. Registered Shares DL
summary: SPX Corporation is a global provider of highly engineered products and technologies, supplying solutions to the heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC), detection and measurement, and engineered solutions markets. The company's products and services are used in a variety of industries, including power generation, oil and gas, and food and beverage. SPX Corporation is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.
